body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/getSupInfoList 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/getSupInfoList 
 ## 接口描述 
结算单新增时，外部系统需要根据费控的供应商查询到相应名称的编码信息，才能新增 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","sensitive":true,"required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAXFT00001%E7%9A%84%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","name":"data"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supId","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86ID","exampleValue":"SUP20221013144327"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supNam","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%A8%A1%E6%8B%9F%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%862"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"taxNum","label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"123456789454dsad55"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supStatus","sensitive":true,"required":true,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","desc":"%20%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%3A0%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A81%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","exampleValue":"0"}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/api/v1/common/getSupInfoList?OPAUID=XFT00001

### 返回示例

```
{
  "data": [
    {
      "supId": "SUP20221019110450",
      "supNam": "薪福通模拟供应商",
      "taxNum": null,
      "supStatus": "1"
    },
    {
      "supId": "SUP20221013144327",
      "supNam": "薪福通模拟供应商2",
      "taxNum": "123456789454dsad55",
      "supStatus": "0"
    }
  ],
  "success": true,
  "message": "调用成功！"
}
```

```
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "接口调用失败，请检查公共参数（CSCPRJCOD）是否为空"
}
```



  
## 错误码说明 
无

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/getSupInfoList

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/getSupInfoList

接口描述

结算单新增时，外部系统需要根据费控的供应商查询到相应名称的编码信息，才能新增

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","sensitive":true,"required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAXFT00001%E7%9A%84%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","name":"data"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supId","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86ID","exampleValue":"SUP20221013144327"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supNam","required":true,"sensitive":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%A8%A1%E6%8B%9F%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%862"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"taxNum","label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"123456789454dsad55"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supStatus","sensitive":true,"required":true,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","desc":"%20%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%3A0%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A81%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","exampleValue":"0"}}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/api/v1/common/getSupInfoList?OPAUID=XFT00001

返回示例

{
  "data": [
    {
      "supId": "SUP20221019110450",
      "supNam": "薪福通模拟供应商",
      "taxNum": null,
      "supStatus": "1"
    },
    {
      "supId": "SUP20221013144327",
      "supNam": "薪福通模拟供应商2",

    }
  ],
  "success": true,

}

    "success": false,
    "message": "接口调用失败，请检查公共参数（CSCPRJCOD）是否为空"
}

无
